description: Fix the pi-context skill-name collision (startup [Skill conflicts] warning via launch-constrained-pi.sh). Cause: scripts/generate-skills.js generateMetaSkill copies every sub-package skill into the meta-package (packages/pi-project-workflows/skills/<name>), and FGAP-090's resources_discover now self-surfaces packages/pi-context/skills/pi-context — so pi-context's skill reaches pi's name-keyed loader from two paths -> collision (byte-identical copies, cosmetic but a self-inflicted regression). Second root: generate-skills never cleans the meta skills dir (mkdir+writeFile only), so orphans persist. FIX (both roots): (1) rmSync the meta skills dir at the start of generateMetaSkill before regenerating (idempotent clean-rebuild; import rmSync); (2) skip pi-context in the copy loop (`if (result.shortName==="pi-context") continue;`) since it self-surfaces via resources_discover; keep copying pi-workflows + pi-behavior-monitors (no resources_discover hook). Then npm run skills removes packages/pi-project-workflows/skills/pi-context/.
acceptance_criteria: generate-skills.js: rmSync clean-rebuild of meta skills dir at start of generateMetaSkill + pi-context excluded from the copy loop (workflows/monitors still copied)
after npm run skills: packages/pi-project-workflows/skills/pi-context/ no longer exists (git deletion staged); other 3 meta skill dirs intact
runtime via the real load path: cd $(mktemp -d) && launch-constrained-pi.sh -p noop --mode json ... shows ZERO [Skill conflicts]/pi-context collision lines
idempotent: npm run skills twice -> identical tree, no orphan
notes: Follow-on of FGAP-090/TASK-074 (resources_discover introduced the second path). Fix both roots (redundant copy + no-clean) — skipping pi-context alone would leave the orphan (negligent). Principled end-state (workflows/monitors also self-surface, meta stops bundling) is FEAT-007-adjacent future. Verify via launch-constrained-pi.sh from a SCRATCH cwd (pi install -l touches scratch .pi/, never the repo's). NO RELEASE (held).
